headline: JPMorgan Smart Monitor Cuts Research Time 83% for Asset Management Analysts and Portfolio Managers
the_so_what: Smart Monitor sits in JPMorgan's Asset Management division — used by career research analysts and portfolio managers, not wealth advisors. The 83% research time reduction accelerates the alpha generation engine (500 analysts, $500M annual research spend, 5,000 companies covered) that feeds into the investment products wealth clients consume. Connect Coach is the separate advisor-facing tool on the wealth management side. The distinction matters: Goldman has 46,000 employees on its AI platform but focused on code and document generation. JPMorgan is deploying AI across both the investment factory (Smart Monitor) and the distribution layer (Connect Coach) — a two-sided approach rivals are building piecemeal.
source_name: JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management (slide 12)
summary: At JPMorgan Chase's 2025 Investor Day on May 20, the Asset & Wealth Management presentation disclosed Smart Monitor — an AI-integrated research platform built on the Spectrum platform, used specifically by career research analysts and portfolio managers in the Asset Management division (run by George Gatch), not by wealth advisors. Smart Monitor processes millions of call reports, 10-Qs, 10-Ks, and daily stock moves, generating tailored alerts and analysis customised to each user's preferred ratios. The result: an 83% reduction in time spent researching a topic. CEO Mary Callahan Erdoes distinguished it from Connect Coach (the advisor-facing tool) and Guidelines (operations), noting Smart Monitor serves the investment professionals who generate the alpha that wealth management clients consume. JPMorgan's 500 career research analysts cover 5,000 companies with 11,000 meetings per year and $500 million in annual research spend.

key_stat.label: Reduction in time spent researching a topic — JPMorgan Smart Monitor (Spectrum), 2025 Investor Day

verified_claims: Smart Monitor (Spectrum) deployed for investors — AI-integrated workflow, automated insights, custom universes, extensive coverage (Investor Day slide 12)
83% reduction in time spent researching a topic — before vs. today comparison shown on slide 12
Smart Monitor presented alongside Connect Coach (advisors) and Guidelines (operations) as three production AI platforms
AI use cases include 'enable quicker decision-making' and 'proactive and anticipatory client advice' — listed as NEW for 2025 on slide 12
JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day AWM presentation, May 20, 2025 — verified by Haresh directly from source PDF
_governance.notes: All claims sourced directly from JPMorgan 2025 Investor Day Asset & Wealth Management presentation, slide 12. Source PDF verified by Haresh against the actual document. human_approved: Track 2 entry.

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Morgan Stanley (scaled, 98% adoption), BofA (scaled, 30B interactions), Goldman (deployed, 46K employees)
